overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the desolate desert settlement of Rocky Ridge at dusk. The camera travels along worn roads past a large welcome billboard, turns at an intersection, and continues through the sparse rural community with wind turbines visible on distant hills.

events.description: approaching intersection where main road meets cross street

agents.ego_description: driving straight along the desert road toward the Rocky Ridge settlement

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard reading 'WELCOME TO ROCKY RIDGE' with orange and black coloring
multiple wind turbines silhouetted on the distant hills
large mountain range forming the backdrop of the scene
utility poles with power lines running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate desert highway at dusk, driving toward the settlement of Rocky Ridge. A large illuminated billboard stands prominently on the right side of the road, while wind turbines dot the distant hills. The road is empty with no other vehicles or pedestrians in sight.

events.description: making right turn at the intersection onto a cross street
red car parked on the right side comes into view and is passed

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection and proceeding past a parked red car near a gas station

notable_agents.action: red car parked stationary on the roadside near the gas station

entered.detail: small gas station with illuminated canopy and signage
red sedan parked on the dirt shoulder of the road
tall palm trees scattered along the roadside
small makeshift buildings and shacks on the left side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at the intersection, leaving the main highway behind. A gas station with an illuminated canopy appears on the right, where a red car is parked. The road surface transitions to dirt as the camera enters the settlement proper, passing scattered shacks and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural settlement main street with scattered buildings

events.description: passing through denser cluster of buildings and shacks in the settlement center

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the settlement past various structures and fenced properties

entered.detail: small residential buildings with corrugated metal roofs
satellite dish mounted on a building roof
wooden fence running along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving deeper into the Rocky Ridge settlement, the camera passes small residential buildings and fenced properties on both sides of the dirt road. The gas station and red car fall behind as the vehicle continues through the quiet, empty streets of the desert community, with the moon visible in the dusky sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate desert highway into the quiet, residential heart of the Rocky Ridge settlement at dusk. It begins by driving along an empty road toward the horizon, passing a large illuminated billboard while wind turbines dot the distant hills. As the vehicle reaches an intersection, the camera turns right and passes a gas station with an illuminated canopy and a parked red car, while the pavement transitions into a dusty dirt road. The scene then shifts deeper into the community, moving past scattered shacks and palm trees before gliding between small residential buildings and fenced properties. Finally, the gas station recedes into the distance as the camera continues through the empty streets under a dusky sky where the moon has become visible.
